title: Neotinea lactea
taxonomy: Neotinea lactea is classified within the genus Neotinea, which is part of the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The genus Neotinea is further divided into the subfamily Orchidoideae. Within the Orchidoideae subfamily, Neotinea lactea is classified as a terrestrial orchid. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is often found in dry, sandy areas. Neotinea lactea is sometimes also referred to as the 'white bee orchid' due to its unique coloration.
